metadata.description: Pathology Report Checker — analyzes surgical pathology cancer reports for CAP/ICCR compliance, validates pTNM staging (AJCC 8th), generates synoptic templates, tumor-board summaries, SNOMED CT / ICD-O-3 coding, and free-text→synoptic conversion. English & Turkish.

plugins.name: pathology-report-checker
plugins.description: All-in-one surgical pathology QA skill: CAP/ICCR compliance scoring, TNM staging validation, synoptic templates, tumor-board summaries, SNOMED/ICD-O-3 coding, amendments. Breast, colorectal, exocrine pancreas, gastric. EN/TR.
